examples: I'm definitely coming to the party.
This is definitely the best pizza I've ever had.
You should definitely try the cheesecake.
context: I am definitely going to sleep well after all of this good food I ate today.
But I definitely like the apple pie more tonight.

examples: What are the main ingredients in this dish?
Fresh ingredients make all the difference.
I need to buy a few ingredients for dinner.
context: This is the secret ingredient to good pie.

examples: The cake has a soft, fluffy texture.
I love the crunchy texture of fried chicken.
The texture of this fabric is so smooth.
context: The taste is quite unique and the texture is very soft and mushy.
